title: Summarize notable Rails main changes for the week of 2026-06-08
prompt: Using ONLY the changelog text provided in the attachment, write a one-page summary of the notable changes merged into rails/rails main during the week of 2026-06-08. Group by component (Active Record, Action Pack, etc.).
acceptance: Every change has a one-line summary and a source URL. <= 350 words. No claims beyond the provided text.

title: One-page digest of arXiv:2606.01234 (open access)
prompt: Read the provided abstract + introduction of this open-access paper and produce a one-page plain-language digest: problem, method, headline result, and one limitation.
acceptance: <= 400 words. States the headline metric with its number. Names one concrete limitation.

title: Digest: what shipped in PostgreSQL 18 beta this week
prompt: From the provided release notes excerpt, summarize the user-visible changes in the latest PostgreSQL 18 beta. Highlight anything affecting RLS or logical replication.
acceptance: Bulleted, each bullet <= 2 sentences with a source URL. <= 300 words.

title: Explain the new Active Record async query API in plain terms
prompt: Using the provided docs excerpt only, explain the new Active Record async query API to a mid-level Rails developer, with one small before/after example.
acceptance: Includes a before/after snippet. <= 300 words. No invented APIs.

title: What is this public-domain essay about? (Project Gutenberg #74xx)
prompt: Given the provided full text of this public-domain essay, write a short 'what it's about' summary plus three themes.
acceptance: <= 250 words. Three named themes. Public-domain source only.
